Polar Camels are made from 18/8 gauge stainless steel (18% chromium/8% nickel) - also known as Type 304 Food Grade.

products.title: Polar Camel 1 1/4 Quart Serving Bowl with Lid
products.bodyHtml: The double-wall, vacuum-insulated bowl keeps food hot or cold for potlucks,holiday parties, or any gathering. It features a clear, snug fitting lid with a hook so it can be hung out of the way on the side of the bowl and non-skid grips on the bottom to prevent sliding and scratched counters. The powder-coated bowls can be personalized to be as unique as the recipes inside and make great gifts or incentives. An optional insert allows for full-color seasonal decoration or an extra pop of color!

products.title: Polar Camel 10 oz. Black Sippy Cup
products.bodyHtml: Polar Camel Sippy Cups are 10 oz. double wall insulated powder coated cups featuring removable handles, a silicone boot, and spill proof lid. The screw on lid features a hard plastic spout with a rubber leak proof valve. The cup can be used with or without the heavy-duty plastic handles that attach to the lid. They offer plenty of space for personalization and can be taken apart for easy cleaning. The plastic lid may need an occasional deep cleaning.

products.title: Polar Camel Wine Chiller
products.bodyHtml: Designed to keep wine cool anywhere whether at home in front of the TV or outdoors around a campfire. Simply place your pre-chilled wine bottle into the chiller and screw on the lid to keep your wine chilled for hours! The wine chiller can also be pre-chilled if you wish, pop it in the fridge or fill it with ice and water until you're ready to use it. The included silicone pad helps to protect the bottle and cut noise, and there's a nonslip grip on the bottom. The chiller fits most wine bottles.
